user.title: Vietnam Weather (NCHMF)
user.description: Enter the NCHMF page URL for the province you want. Find it on nchmf.gov.vn (change the `w..` code). The default is Da Nang.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure NCHMF location
reconfigure.description: Change the NCHMF page URL or display name.

error.cannot_connect: Could not fetch or parse the page. Check the URL.
